title: coleus congensis
intro: Coleus congensis, also known as Andrographis paniculata or Kalmegh, is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Coleus congensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal preparations such as teas and infusions.
